vocab.meaning: có giá trị cao hơn, đắt đỏ hơn (vì thương hiệu hoặc chất lượng)
vocab.example: Designer footwear often commands a premium due to the prestige associated with the logo.

vocab.meaning: hợp thời trang, dẫn đầu xu hướng
vocab.example: I look for famous brands that are fashion-forward and constantly pushing the boundaries of shoe design.
I invest in high-end athletic brands specifically for their superior cushioning, which protects my joints while running.

vocab.meaning: thị trường hàng giả, hàng nhái
vocab.example: With the rise of the counterfeit market, I only purchase from official boutiques to ensure I'm getting the real deal.

vocab.meaning: vị thế/sự uy tín trong xã hội
vocab.example: For many young people, wearing recognizable brands is a way to gain a sense of social prestige among their peers.

vocab.meaning: tiết kiệm chi phí về lâu dài
vocab.example: Buying expensive leather boots is actually more cost-effective in the long run because they last for a decade.
Limited-edition sneakers from famous brands often maintain a high resale value on secondary markets.
I'm drawn to companies whose brand philosophy emphasizes environmental sustainability and fair labor.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng không thể chê vào đâu được (không thỏa hiệp)
vocab.example: I don't mind paying extra for established labels that are known for their uncompromising quality and attention to detail.
I usually wait for the seasonal collection to go on sale before picking up a new pair of branded shoes.
